texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Kasa Malindi, a paradise where lush tropical gardens meet the pristine shores of Malindi. Our resort offers a tranquil haven for those seeking to unwind and reconnect with nature. Enjoy breathtaking ocean views, indulge in rejuvenating spa treatments, and savor exquisite local cuisine. 15 rooms total in 4 private villas.
